rationale.fidelity: Fully restores display-position capacity, the common at-most-twelve product set, uncertain visitor choice, and expected margin without inventory or fulfillment decisions.
rationale.managerial_framing: The merchandising actor, choice deadline, position opportunity cost, choice-set mechanism, and alternative feasible set are all concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature contribution is asserted, so this conditional category is satisfied without overclaiming.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It labels the twelve-position representation as simplifying, rejects fulfillment-congestion and service claims, and identifies validation needs for both interface capacity and choice probabilities.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and navigable, with minor repetition across the diagnosis, fidelity paragraph, and mapping.
rationale.overall: An excellent diagnosis and faithful rewrite that cleanly avoids the capacity-conflation and causal-story traps.
